final:
module sram_cell (
    input wire D,
    input wire WE,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q
);

always @(posedge CLK) begin
    if (WE) begin
        Q <= D;  // Store the data
    end
    // If WE is low, Q retains its value (hold state)
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (WE) begin
        Q <= ~D;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
